subsection.name: Description
subsection.div: Checks that overloaded methods are grouped together. Overloaded methods have the same name but different signatures where the signature can differ by the number of input parameters or type of input parameters or both.

tr.td: Control whether to enforce order by increasing parameter count (arity) or not.

subsection.name: Examples
subsection.p:
To configure the check according to
OpenJDK guidelines, where overloaded methods should be grouped together and ordered by increasing parameter count:

subsection.name: Violation Messages
subsection.p: All messages can be customized if the default message doesn't suit you. Please see the documentation to learn how to.

subsection.name: Fully Qualified Name
subsection.p: Use this fully qualified class name in configuration when an exact class reference is required.
